detaileddescription.para: Correct joint limit violations in given trajectory. Ensures that each joint position in all waypoints is within configured limits.

memberdef.argsstring: (const ors::Shape &eef, const ors::Shape &target, ors::Vector &error, int axes=7)
memberdef.name: computeAlignmentError

detaileddescription.para: Checks, whether a given goal state was reached

simplesect.para: True, if actual state is within goal tolerance

detaileddescription.para: Check given trajectory or waypoint for detected collisions, using given KinematicWorld

parameterdescription.para: The KinematicWorld to use for collision checking
The Trajectory or waypoint to check
A string that will contain a resulting error message

simplesect.para: True, if no collision was detected
